column1: # Lovable preview uses inline styles for the app shell and serves a SPA,
# so we suppress noisy rules that aren't actionable in our hosting model.

column3: X-Frame-Options header (CSP frame-ancestors is preferred but Lovable hosts the shell)
CSP header missing (Lovable host responsibility, not user-app fixable)
